body.script: self.__next_f.push([1,"19:[\"$\",\"$L1c\",null,{\"formats\":\"$undefined\",\"locale\":\"en\",\"messages\":{\"PlaybookPage\":{\"navigation-button-1\":\"what's a DAO coin?\",\"navigation-button-2\":\"when to launch a DAO?\",\"navigation-button-3\":\"types of DAOs\",\"navigation-button-4\":\"why is the token mintable?\",\"mintable-subtitle-basics\":\"basics\",\"mintable-subtitle-how-it-works\":\"how it works\",\"mintable-subtitle-platform-promises\":\"platform promises\",\"title\":\"creator playbook\",\"subtitle\":\"all you need to know to begin your DAO journey\",\"dao-coin\":\"what's a DAO coin?\",\"dao-coin-subtitle\":\"DAOs are tokenized communities with a mission and a shared treasury.\",\"dao-coin-paragraph\":\"a DAO’s community can be interest-based like Decentralized Alcoholics for whiskey enjoyers, ai16z for AI agents, or mission based, like HairDAO trying to regrow hair for members. a DAO's mission can be as simple as make money for holders, which functions like an onchain VC or hedgefun.\",\"when-dao\":\"when to launch a DAO?\",\"when-dao-subtitle\":\"launch a DAO if you have a mission and needs resources to achieve it.\",\"when-dao-paragraph\":\"you should launch a DAO if one or more of the following is true:\",\"when-dao-list-1\":\"you want to have a treasury\",\"when-dao-list-2\":\"you have a multi-year mission like “get WIF on the Las Vegas sphere”, “buy the Constitution”, “start the next Berkshire Hathaway” or “fund an open source Github”\",\"when-dao-list-3\":\"you want coin holders to vote on the direction of community\",\"when-dao-list-4\":\"you foresee the need / want to raise more money in the future\",\"dao-types\":\"types of DAOs\",\"dao-types-subtitle\":\"DAOs can be hedgefuns / VC DAOs, interest-based, mission-focused DAOs, or a combination of the three.\",\"dao-types-hedgefun\":\"hedgefuns and VC DAOs\",\"dao-types-hedgefun-subtitle\":\"deploy capital, manage portfolios, and back high-conviction bets — together.\",\"dao-types-interest\":\"interest-based DAOs\",\"dao-types-interest-subtitle\":\"rally around shared passions — from memes to alcohol and high fashion.\",\"dao-types-mission\":\"mission-focused DAOs\",\"dao-types-mission-subtitle\":\"coordinate around a cause, drive impact, and build toward a shared future.\",\"hedgefun-card-title\":\"hedgefuns and VC DAOs\",\"interest-card-title\":\"interest-based\",\"mission-card-title\":\"mission-focused\",\"ai16z_vc_description\":\"ai16z started as a VC fund that turned 20k to $26 million\",\"tcm_description\":\"Started by time.fun degen Bruce, Time compounded $2k to over $25k in AUM and growing.\",\"topkek_description\":\"KDOT is an astute DAO manager, onboarded several prominent DAOs and grew treasury over 500%.\",\"left_curve_description\":\"Jakee delivered 800% returns on around $25k of capital to LEFT holders, a true degen.\",\"babble_os_description\":\"BabbleOS is a DAO that no one fully understands. it has a strong following around eccentric artist JIMMY EDGAR, whose followers enjoy sending money into the void\",\"alcohol_dao_description\":\"web4O started a DAO to acquire tokenized spirits on Baxus.co and ended up creating a gathering place for high-functioning alcoholics\",\"yakuzai_description\":\"started by DrinkNoir founders, Yakuzai is a mafia of L.A. fashion icons and media brokers.\",\"ai16z_mission_description\":\"started as a humble VC fund, ai16z grew to be a leader in AI agents on Solana, leading a \u003e20k star open-source Github as well as launchpad. What's next for the DAO?\",\"aiccelerate_description\":\"aiccelerate is an elite collection of individuals promoting and fostering the future of AI on Solana.\",\"drugs_description\":\"started by PumpScience founders and enthusiasts, BigPharmAI's mission is to flip the pharmaceutical industry on its head, one drug deal at a time.\",\"translator-twitter\":\"\",\"why_mintable_title\":\"why is the token mintable?\",\"why_mintable_subtitle\":\"some screeners will display a warning over DAO tokens being mintable. Why is the DAO token mintable? this allows the DAO to stay relevant long-term and increase value long-term for holders.\",\"why_mintable_description\":\"major DAOs like Uniswap, Aave, and protocols like Solana \u0026 Bitcoin all have mintable tokens; either to incent network participants or raise more protocol funds in the future. mintable open allow the community to vote to raise more money for the DAO, ensuring longevity of the team without necessarily tanking the price\",\"why_mintable_list_question-1\":\"how would that work?\",\"why_mintable_list_answer-1\":\"say ai16z is trading at $100 million market cap\",\"why_mintable_list_answer-2\":\"...and the team wants to raise $1 million for dev of a new agents launchpad that would take the DAO to new heights\",\"why_mintable_list_answer-3\":\"ai16z token holders can vote to mint 1% of supply to raise that $1 million from strategic investors or the public\",\"why_mintable_list_answer-4\":\"1% inflation for a bullish new launchpad? It’s up for the partners and ai16z holders to decide\",\"why_mintable_list_question-2\":\"promises daos.fun makes regarding mintable open technology\",\"why_mintable_promise-1\":\"protocol will be fully audited by major firms before rollout\",\"why_mintable_promise-2\":\"a few select test DAOs will have access before rolling out to all DAOs\",\"why_mintable_promise-3\":\"a veto board will be created as an additional safeguard\"}},\"now\":\"$undefined\",\"timeZone\":\"UTC\",\"children\":\"$L1d\"}]\n"])

self.__next_f.push([1,"1d:[\"$\",\"$L1e\",null,{\"children\":[\"$\",\"$Ld\",null,{\"parallelRouterKey\":\"children\",\"error\":\"$undefined\",\"errorStyles\":\"$undefined\",\"errorScripts\":\"$undefined\",\"template\":[\"$\",\"$Lf\",null,{}],\"templateStyles\":\"$undefined\",\"templateScripts\":\"$undefined\",\"notFound\":[[\"$\",\"div\",null,{\"className\":\"flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-screen text-center\",\"children\":[[\"$\",\"div\",null,{\"className\":\"flex flex-col relative text-center -top-20\",\"children\":[[\"$\",\"span\",null,{\"className\":\"text-xl md:text-3xl font-semibold\",\"children\":\"404 - page not found\"}],[\"$\",\"span\",null,{\"className\":\"text-base md:text-lg font-book px-4\",\"children\":[\"You can\",\" \",[\"$\",\"$L1f\",null,{\"href\":\"/\",\"className\":\"dark:text-ds-blue-600\",\"children\":\"go home\"}],\" \",\"or you can read your fortune by selecting a card below.\"]}]]}],[\"$\",\"$L20\",null,{}]]}],[[\"$\",\"link\",\"0\",{\"rel\":\"stylesheet\",\"href\":\"/_next/static/chunks/d2fb9a5c36da3ca9.css?dpl=dpl_B7YQtmqEatBj5PvzLzKhbvBzYdxi\",\"precedence\":\"next\",\"crossOrigin\":\"$undefined\",\"nonce\":\"$undefined\"}]]],\"forbidden\":\"$undefined\",\"unauthorized\":\"$undefined\"}]}]\n14:null\n"])
